# TCG Lightning

> Free Magic: The Gathering deck builder for Windows, macOS, and Linux

## About
TCG Lightning is a desktop application for building Magic: The Gathering decks. It supports all major formats and aims to build a complete MTG ecosystem — from deck building to online play.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://tcg-lightning.com/
- Blog: https://tcg-lightning.com/blog
- Wiki: https://tcg-lightning.com/wiki
- Download: https://github.com/dimfred/tcg-lightning/releases/latest

## Features
- Offline Scryfall card search across 90,000+ cards
- EDHREC synergy scores, staples and inclusion rates
- Automatic combo detection via Archidekt Combo Spellbook
- AI deck assistant (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama)
- Collection management with Manabox import
- Proxy PDF generation for playtesting
- Performance tracking (win/loss/draw stats per deck)
- XMage integration for online play (in development)

## Current Development
Building an XMage bridge to enable playing Magic directly from TCG Lightning. Blog posts document the progress from terminal prototype to full UI integration.

## Blog
- XMage Integration Progress: https://tcg-lightning.com/blog/xmage-proxy-2
- Playing Magic in the Terminal: https://tcg-lightning.com/blog/xmage-proxy-1
- Performance Tracking: https://tcg-lightning.com/blog/performance-tracking
- First Release: https://tcg-lightning.com/blog/first-release
